name: White Bean, Radish and Red Onion Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cucumber, thinly sliced or diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and rinse them well.
2. Place the drained beans in a salad bowl.
3. Add the chopped red onion, cucumber slices, radishes, minced garlic, and parsley to the bowl.
4. Toss everything together.
5. Stir in the lemon juice (or sherry vinegar), olive oil (or vegetable oil), salt, and pepper until well combined.
6. Serve over a bed of red leaf lettuce (or other lettuce).
